properties:
SELECT * FROM quizzes WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;
select content, mafia_Id, quiz_title, quiz_Id from quizzes
select content, mafia_id, quiz_title, quiz_id from quizzes where quiz_id = ?
INSERT INTO quizzes (quiz_id, user_id, mafia_id, quiz_title, content, answer, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NOW())
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(quiz_id), 0) + 1 FROM quizzes
DELETE FROM quizzes WHERE quiz_id = ? AND mafia_id = ( SELECT mafia_id FROM mafia_history WHERE user_id = ? AND selected_date = CURDATE() )
DELETE FROM quizzes WHERE quiz_id = ?
UPDATE quizzes SET quiz_title = ?, content = ?, answer = ? WHERE quiz_id = ? AND mafia_id = ( SELECT mafia_id FROM mafia_history WHERE user_id = ? AND selected_date = CURDATE() )
UPDATE quizzes SET quiz_title = ?, content = ?, answer = ? WHERE quiz_id = ?
-- 오늘의 퀴즈 조회
SELECT quiz_id, quiz_title, content, answer FROM quizzes WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
